case_title: ENOS, JOSEPH VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAXINE ANDERS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENOS, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAXINE ANDERS PLAINTIFF WAS UNABLE TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY A PROPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ENOS, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAXINE ANDERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-27-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO C/O MAXINE ANDERS
